# SmartCalcTools

> Free, private, and 100% client-side offline tools for developers and Islamic finance.

## About Us
SmartCalcTools is a suite of zero-trust web applications. All calculations and data processing occur entirely locally within your browser.

## Key Features & Tools

- [Zakat Calculator](https://smartcalctools.xyz/en/calculators/zakat)
- [Murabaha Calculator](https://smartcalctools.xyz/en/calculators/murabaha)
- [Mudarabah Calculator](https://smartcalctools.xyz/en/calculators/mudarabah)
- [JSON Formatter](https://smartcalctools.xyz/en/tools/json-formatter)
- [JWT Decoder](https://smartcalctools.xyz/en/tools/jwt-decoder)

## Privacy
We do not track, collect, or store any of your inputs. You can read our full [Privacy Policy](https://smartcalctools.xyz/en/privacy-policy).
